entry.title: [GRA][Collaborative solutions] - MX Plan Filerz Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Aug 20, 23:00 UTC  -  Aug 21, 04:00 UTC

Jul 9, 03:16 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our responsibilities for Mail filerz, we will be performing infrastructure maintenance.
The maintenance will update the storage servers hosting your data.
This version brings improvements to certain security mechanisms, as well as some performance enhancements.

Start time : 20/08/2026 23:00 UTC
End time : 21/08/2026 04:00 UTC
Service impact : The service will be temporarily unavailable for 40 minutes during the maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Mail filerz.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Filerz444 Cluster115 Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 16, 21:00 - 23:00 UTC

Jul 16, 15:03 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Web Hosting offer On filerz444 Cluster115.

Start time : 16/07/2026 21:00 UTC
End time : 16/07/2026 23:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance window, a network maintenance will be performed. Websites will be temporarily inaccessible for 30 minutes.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [GLOBAL][Collaborative solutions] - EmailPro / Hosted Exchange / MX Plan Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
Jul 16, 17:19 UTC
Completed - All services are operational.

Jul 15, 18:01 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jul 15, 18:01 UTC
Scheduled - We will be undergoing scheduled maintenance during this time.

Jul 15, 17:56 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jul 15, 17:55 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Collaborative solutions offer.

Start time : 14/07/2026 17:30 UTC
End time : 16/07/2026 17:00 UTC
Service impact : The Microsoft Exchange service may be experiencing intermittent unavailability or increased latency for EmailPro, Hosted Exchange and MX Plan.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Collaborative solutions.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [GLOBAL][Web Hosting] - Multiple Clusters Incident Notification
entry.content:
Jul 16, 16:23 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Web Hosting offering, which is causing temporary availability issue in multiple clusters.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 16/07/2026 15:06 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some clusters are temporarily unavailable on Web Hosting.
Customers Impact : Some customers may encounter 500 errors when trying to access their services.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [GLOBAL][Collaborative solutions] - Zimbra Incident Notification
entry.content:
Jul 16, 08:13 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Collaborative solutions offering has been resolved.

Start time : 16/07/2026 02:27 UTC
End time : 16/07/2026 08:10 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Access to mailboxes was unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers were currently unable to access their mailboxes, which means they cannot read, send, or manage their emails.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a hardware issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 16, 06:46 UTC
Identified - Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.


We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 16, 06:45 UTC
Update - We are continuing to investigate this issue.

Jul 16, 02:54 UTC
Investigating - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Collaborative solutions offer.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 16/07/2026 02:27 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Access to mailboxes is unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are currently unable to access their mailboxes, which means they cannot read, send, or manage their emails.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA][Collaborative solutions] - MX Plan Filerz maintenance notification
entry.content:
Jul 16, 04:17 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jul 15, 23:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jul 8, 13:36 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, a maintenance is scheduled on our MX Plan Filerz.
The maintenance will update the storage servers hosting your data.
This version brings improvements to certain security mechanisms, as well as some performance enhancements.

Start time : 15/07/2026 23:00 UTC
End time : 16/07/2026 04:00 UTC
Service impact : The service will be temporarily unavailable for 40 minutes during the maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Mail filerz.

Thank you for your understanding.
